page_metadata.biotools__summary: m6ADD is a database containing manually collected experimentally confirmed m6A (N6-methyladenosine)-disease data and data obtained from high-throughput disease m6A modification profiles, aimed at exploring the association between m6A modified gene disorders and diseases
